title: Persistent Teammate definitions carry colors
description: Brooks's directive: every persistent Teammate def gets a color in frontmatter for visual identification (scribe blue, builder orange, viewer green, packager purple, architect cyan); the _teammate.template.md shape gains the color line so new Instances inherit the convention. Chartered definition change: alignment gate + Team Lead approval; Src-First.
acceptance_criteria: All five persistent Teammate defs (and the template scribe.md + _teammate.template.md shape) carry color frontmatter
fix: color frontmatter on all five persistent Teammates (scribe blue templated) + _teammate.template.md color line. alignment PASS, Brooks approved.
